case_title: ADLANE GUENANE VS. 442 NATOMA STREET, LLC.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 - SERVED NOV-05-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TUCKER, KYLE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 - SERVED NOV-05-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT 442 NATOMA STREET, LLC.
ORDER AMENDS CLAIM, RE: CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY GUENANE, ADLANE AS TO DEFENDANT 442 NATOMA STREET, LLC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-30-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY GUENANE, ADLANE AS TO DEFENDANT 442 NATOMA STREET, LLC. TUCKER, KYLE
ORDER CASE DISMISSED PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-30-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JAN-31-2019 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ADLANE GUENANE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT GLOBAL DEVOTIONS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT KYLE TUCKER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT 442 NATOMA, LLC IS NOT PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE WAS FILED UNTIMELY ON DEFENDANT KYLE TUCKER AND 442 NATOMA LLC. PROOF OF SERVICE WAS FILED ON WRONG DEFENDANT ENTITY: 442 NATOMA. CORRECT BUSINESS ENTITY IS GLOBAL DEVOTIONS. HONORABLE JUDGE VAN AKEN AMENDS CLAIM. BOTH DEFENDANT WAIVE SERVICE. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT DURING THE COURT PROCEEDING. IF NO APPEARANCE AT THE JAN-31-2019 HEARING THE MATTER IS TO BE DISMIMSSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE AS PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF ADLANE GUENANE. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT 442 NATOMA ST LLC. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF ADLANE GUENANE RE: ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GUENANE, ADLANE
